word: G5381 - φιλονεξία - philonexía - fil-on-ex-ee'-ah - Entertain stranger

sections.paragraph:
- Original: φιλονεξία

- Transliteration: Philoxenia

- Phonetic: fil-ox-en-ee'-ah

- Definition:

1. love to strangers, hospitality

- Origin: from G5382

- TDNT entry: 5:1,*

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G5382; hospitableness: - entertain strangers hospitality.
